summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ariadne Editorial Studio Batch 3 features. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 10 test scenarios passed. All requested features verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogDescription or aria-describedby for accessibility

context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 3 complete. All 3 batches of UX features now tested and working: Batch 1 (dark/light themes, collapsible sidebar, simplified registration, Italian labels, logo), Batch 2 (async post generation, feed image uploads, humanized community dashboard with member chips), Batch 3 (simplified course catalog 'Il mio percorso' with 7 seeded courses, user billing/payment management, 'Edizioni' terminology).
